vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. All registered plants have suffered a total systemic loss. The environment is currently devoid of living botanical matter.
anomalies: Metal spoon intervention in P1 (T-2, T-1).
Disappearance of the initial sprout observed in the earliest image.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a sequence of decline leading to a sterile environment. The initial images showed a singular, fragile sprout which subsequently failed. The introduction of a metal spoon suggests human intervention, but the final state is one of complete botanical vacancy. The biome is currently inactive.
